user.title: Acond Heat Pump Setup
user.description: Enter the IP address of your heat pump and select the series.

data_description.host: IP address of the heat pump on your network (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
data_description.hp_series:
Grandis / Economis = compressor speed (rpm)
PRO = compressor power (W)

init.title: Edit IP address
init.description:
If the heat pump's IP address on your network has changed, you can update it here without reinstalling the integration. The integration will automatically reconnect to the new address.

Heat pump series cannot be edited – changing it requires a reinstall.

data_description.host: New IP address of the heat pump on your network (e.g. 192.168.1.100)
